items.title: I tried to do everything on the TCL NXTPAPER 14, and it turns out it's really just for readers
items.summary: Looking for a tablet these days is fairly simple: you find the brightest screen, the fastest chip, the lightest or thinnest chassis for the lowest price and go from there. Or you just get an iPad. The TCL NXTPAPER series

items.title: I found the hidden Android setting that stops your phone from dropping to dead Wi-Fi
items.summary: We’ve all experienced it: your internet slows to a crawl as your phone clings to a weak Wi-Fi connection instead of switching to cellular data.

items.title: I stopped setting up my hotspot the default way and got noticeably faster speeds
items.summary: My smartphone hotspot gets a lot of use when I'm working out of the house or traveling. It's often a better and more secure option than public Wi-Fi.

items.title: I replaced 6 official Android apps with open-source alternatives — they're all much better
